## BaseTaskId type

Task identifier within a single source Character restrictions: alphanumeric, dashes, underscores only (no dots) Pattern: /^\[a-zA-Z0-9\_-\]+$/

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type BaseTaskId = Brand<string, 'BaseTaskId'>;
```
